sql_array: CREATE TABLE multiply_test (a INTEGER, b INTEGER, result INTEGER);
INSERT INTO multiply_test (a, b, result) VALUES (2, 3, multiply(2, 3));
UPDATE multiply_test SET result = multiply(a, b) WHERE a = 2;
SELECT a, b, result FROM multiply_test WHERE result = multiply(a, b);
DELETE FROM multiply_test WHERE result < multiply(1, 10);
